Fields.Name: Particle ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for this missile

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: Time for projectile to exist in flight (-1 is infinite). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Hit Sphere Radius
Fields.Description: The radius of the hit sphere. In centimetres.

Fields.Name: Attenuation Range
Fields.Description: If the bullet flight distance exceeds this value, the attenuation set by other parameters will be applied.

Fields.Name: Gravity: In Range
Fields.Description: Gravity applied downward within range. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Gravity: Out of Range
Fields.Description: Gravity applied downward outside of range. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: MP Consumption
Fields.Description: The mana consumption when this missile is fired.

Fields.Name: Acceleration: In Range
Fields.Description: Acceleration whilst projectile is within distance threshold. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Acceleration: Out of Range
Fields.Description: Acceleration whilst projectile is beyond the distance threshold. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Hit Bullet ID
Fields.Description: The bullet to generate when the projectile expires, or conditionally according to some launchConditionType values.

Fields.Name: Will Expire
Fields.Description: If ON, this missile will expire when its duration reaches zero.

Fields.Name: Will Explode
Fields.Description: If ON, this missile will explode when its duration reaches zero.

Fields.Name: Behavior ID on Hit
Fields.Description: The behavior ID to apply to the victim when this missile hits.
